name: Bionomics Limited
description: Bionomics Limited is an Australia-based clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company. The Company is focused on developing novel, first-in-class, allosteric modulators of ion channels to treat central nervous system (CNS) disorders with high unmet medical needs. Its lead drug candidate, BNC210, is a novel, proprietary, negative allosteric modulator of the alpha-7 nicotinic acetylcholine receptor, under development for the acute treatment of Social Anxiety Disorder (SAD) and chronic treatment of Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD).
